package.name: poseEstimation3D
package.description: Thin ROS 1 client for the SAM3DBody-cpp net server. Streams an RGB image topic to a remote GPU pose-estimation server (sam_3dbody_net) and republishes the result as a TF tree and a Float32MultiArray — a drop-in 3D human pose stack for old ROS 1 robots, the same way mocapnet_rosnode worked.
package.author: Ammar Qammaz
